kept.title: Type-Constrained Code Generation with Language Models.
kept.reason: LLM code generation guided by formal type systems for semantic correctness and reduced errors.

kept.title: Verified Foundations for Differential Privacy.
kept.reason: Verified DP foundation (Lean) with production use; adjacent to formal verification but lacks LLM/AI component.

kept.title: DR.FIX: Automatically Fixing Data Races at Industry Scale.
kept.reason: LLMs integrated with program analysis for automated data race fixing in Go, targeting semantic correctness.
LLMs integrated with compiler analysis for input-centric optimization, combining PL and AI

kept.title: Efficient Linearizability Monitoring.
kept.reason: Uses LLM to learn heuristics for program lifting into DSLs, a synthesis/compilation task.

kept.title: First-Class Verification Dialects for MLIR.
kept.reason: Uses SMT solvers for formal verification of compiler IR semantics, but lacks a core LLM/AI component.
